reference: Hi. I have been trying to conceive for the past two months. Currently, I have missed my period for eight days. I took a home pregnancy test today, but the result was negative. There are some symptoms that make me feel I am pregnant. Can the home test be wrong as well, or is it one hundred% accurate all the time?
text: hi i have been trying to conceive for the past two months currently i have missed my period for eight days i took a home pregnancy test today but the result was negative there are some symptoms that mean i am pregnant can the home test be wrong as well or is it 100 accurate all the time
